creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed


The WITHOUT_MILTER option is only 
for libmilter and friends. 

Removing mitler from the senddmail core 
does not reduce the size of it much, 
so an extra knob seems not usefull enough. 

You can add such local options to: 
/usr/porst/mail/sendmail/files/site.config.m4.local
